de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.tacletbuilder

Class AbstractInfFlowTacletBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.TermBuilder
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.tacletbuilder.AbstractInfFlowTacletBuilder
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractInfFlowContractAppTacletBuilder, AbstractInfFlowUnfoldTacletBuilder

    abstract class AbstractInfFlowTacletBuilder
extends TermBuilder
    Builds the rule which inserts information flow contract applications.

    Author:
    christoph
